feature: agent-workflow shortcuts, drift-adr subcommand, TaskSpec.to_patch_intent, release version-sync
commit: feat(agent): agent-workflow shortcuts, drift-adr subcommand, TaskSpec.to_patch_intent, release version-sync

artifacts.description: New Makefile targets: feat-start, fix-start, catalog, gate-check, feat-bundle, handover, changelog-entry, audit-diff. Each target calls the corresponding script in scripts/.
artifacts.verification: targets present in Makefile, invoked correctly

artifacts.description: Lists all agent-reachable Makefile targets with optional --search filter. Used via `make catalog`.
Pre-push gate validator for feat/fix/chore commits. Verifies evidence + audit artifacts.
Generates CHANGELOG snippet from commit type and message. Used via `make changelog-entry`.
Diffs audit_results/ against git HEAD to detect stale audit artifacts. Used via `make audit-diff`.
Generates session-handover work_artifact Markdown. Used via `make handover`.
Keeps llms.txt and SECURITY.md version refs in sync post PSR release.
New `drift adr` subcommand: lists ADR files in decisions/ with optional --task filter.
Converts a TaskSpec instance into a PatchIntent for Patch Engine integration.
Compact task-to-gate quick-reference for Drift agents.
CI step that runs scripts/sync_version.py after each PSR release to keep llms.txt and SECURITY.md consistent.

notes: All new scripts and CLI additions are covered by dedicated tests. Makefile targets are wrappers and tested via subprocess invocation in tests.
